member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.ClientSettingsController.Get
member.summary: Gets client settings for the smtp4dev UI.

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MailboxesController
member.summary: Returns information about the version of smtp4dev

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MailboxesController.GetAll
member.summary: Gets list of mailboxes.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.GetNewSummaries(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns all new messages in the INBOX folder since the provided message ID. Returns only the summary without message content.
member.param: If not specified all recently received messages will be returned up to the page limit.
Mailbox name. If not specified, defaults to the mailboxName with name 'Default'
Max number of messages to retrieve. The most recent X are returned.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.GetSummaries(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a list of message summaries including basic details but not the content.
member.param: Case insensitive term to search for in subject, from, to, cc, body content, and attachment filenames
Mailbox name. If not specified, defaults to the mailboxName with name 'Default'
Folder name (INBOX, Sent). If not specified, returns all messages in mailbox
Property name from response type to sort by
True if sort should be descending
Page number to retrieve
Max number of items to retrieve

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.GetMessage(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns the full message details for a message.
member.param: The message ID to get.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.Reply(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile})
member.summary: Replies to the message with the specified ID using the configured relay SMTP server. Accepts either text/html (for body only) or multipart/form-data (for body with optional attachments).
member.param: The Id of the message to reply to
List of email addresses separated by commas
List of email addresses separated by commas
List of email addresses separated by commas
Email address

True if the message should be delivered to the CC and BCC recipients in addition to the TO recipients. When false, the message is only delivered to the TO recipients, but the message headers will show the specified other recipients.
The subject of message
HTML body content (when using multipart/form-data, or as body when using text/html)
Optional files to attach (when using multipart/form-data)

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.Send(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile})
member.summary: Sends a message via the configured upstream/relay SMTP server. Accepts either text/html (for body only) or multipart/form-data (for body with optional attachments).
member.param: List of email addresses separated by commas
List of email addresses separated by commas
List of email addresses separated by commas
Email address

True if the message should be delivered to the CC and BCC recipients in addition to the TO recipients. When false, the message is only delivered to the TO recipients, but the message headers will show the specified other recipients.
The subject of message
HTML body content (when using multipart/form-data)
Optional files to attach (when using multipart/form-data)

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.MarkMessageRead(System.Guid)
member.summary: Marks a single message as read
member.param: The ID of the message to mark read.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.MarkAllRead(System.String)
member.summary: Marks all messages as read.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.DownloadMessage(System.Guid)
member.summary: Downloads message in .eml (message/rfc822) format.
member.param: The ID of the message to download

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.RelayMessage(System.Guid,Rnwood.Smtp4dev.ApiModel.MessageRelayOptions)
member.summary: Attempt to relay the specified message either to the original recipients or to those specified.
member.param: The ID of the message to relay.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.GetPartContent(System.Guid,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns the MIME part contents for the specified message and part.
member.param: Message ID
Part ID

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.GetPartSource(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the source text of MIME part contents for the specified message and part.
member.param: Message ID
Part ID

members.member:
Returns the raw source of MIME part contents for the specified message and part.
RAW source is before any content decoding steps like base64. Message ID Part ID

Returns the raw source text of the specified message.
RAW source is before any content decoding steps like base64. Message ID

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.GetMessageSource(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns the source text of the specified message.
member.param: Message ID

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.GetMessagePlainText(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns the plain text body of the specified message if one exists.
member.param: The ID of the message to get body of.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.GetMessageHtml(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns the HTML text body of the specified message if one exists.
member.param: The ID of the message to get body of.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes the specified message.
member.param: Message ID

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.ImportMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Imports a single EML file as a new message.
member.param: Mailbox name to import the message into
member.returns: The ID of the imported message

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.DeleteAll(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes all messages.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.MessagesController.GetFolders(System.String)
member.summary: Returns available folders for the specified mailbox.
member.param: Mailbox name. If not specified, defaults to the mailboxName with name 'Default'

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.ServerController.GetServer
member.summary: Gets the current state and settings for the smtp4dev server.

members.member:
Updates the state of and settings for the smtp4dev server.
Settings can not be updated if disabled in smtp4dev settings or if the settings file is not writable.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.ServerLogController.GetLogs
member.summary: Gets all server logs currently in memory (formatted as text).

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.ServerLogController.GetLogEntries(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets structured log entries with optional filtering.
member.param: Optional log level filter (e.g., "Information", "Warning", "Error")
Optional source filter
Optional text search filter

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.ServerLogController.GetLogSources
member.summary: Gets distinct log sources currently in the log buffer.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.ServerLogController.GetLogLevels
member.summary: Gets distinct log levels currently in the log buffer.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.ServerLogController.ClearLogs
member.summary: Clears all server logs from memory.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.SessionsController.GetSummaries(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a a list of SMTP session summaries (without the details).
member.param: The page number to get
Maximum number of items to get

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.SessionsController.GetSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the details for the specified session. This does not include the session log - .
member.param: The ID of the session to get

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.SessionsController.GetSessionLog(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the session log for the specified session.
member.param: The ID for the session to get.

member.summary: Deletes the specified session.
member.param: The ID of the session to delete.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Controllers.SessionsController.DeleteAll
member.summary: Deletes all sessions.

member.summary: Returns information about the version of smtp4dev

member.summary: Gets version infomation about smtp4dev.

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Data.Smtp4devDbContextFactory
member.summary: Design-time factory for creating Smtp4devDbContext instances. This allows EF Core tools to create the context without running the application.

member.summary: JSON metadata extracted from MIME message including CC recipients, attachment filenames, etc.

member.summary: Plain text body content extracted from MIME message for searching

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Auth.OAuth2TokenValidator
member.summary: Service for validating OAuth2/XOAUTH2 tokens against an Identity Provider.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Auth.OAuth2TokenValidator.#ctor(Serilog.ILogger)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Logger instance.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Auth.OAuth2TokenValidator.ValidateTokenAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates an OAuth2 access token against the configured IDP.
member.param: The access token to validate.
The OAuth2 authority URL (e.g., https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/v2.0).
The expected audience for the token.
The expected issuer for the token (optional, will use discovery if not provided).
member.returns: A tuple containing validation success status, subject claim, and error message if any.

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.ImportedMessage
member.summary: A message implementation for imported EML files.

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.AttachmentInfo
member.summary: Represents an email attachment with its metadata and content. The consumer is responsible for disposing the Content stream after use.

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.AttachmentInfo.FileName
member.summary: Gets or sets the filename of the attachment.

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.AttachmentInfo.ContentType
member.summary: Gets or sets the MIME content type of the attachment.

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.AttachmentInfo.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the content stream of the attachment. The stream will be disposed by the SMTP client after sending.

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MailboxRouter
member.summary: Handles routing logic for determining which mailbox(es) should receive a message based on recipients, source, and header filters.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MailboxRouter.FindMailboxForRecipient(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.MailboxOptions},System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Finds the target mailbox for a recipient based on mailbox configurations, message source, and message headers.
member.param: The recipient email address
Available mailbox configurations (in priority order)
Client hostname from EHLO/HELO command
Client IP address
Parsed message headers (case-insensitive dictionary)
Username of the authenticated user who sent the message, or null if not authenticated
Default mailbox name for the authenticated user, or null if not applicable
member.returns: The matching mailbox or null if no match found

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MailboxRouter.MatchesRecipientPattern(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a recipient matches the recipient pattern(s) of a mailbox.
member.param: The recipient email address
Comma-separated patterns (glob or regex)
member.returns: True if the recipient matches any pattern

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MailboxRouter.MatchesHeaderFilter(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.HeaderFilterOptions)
member.summary: Checks if a message header matches a header filter.
member.param: Message headers (case-insensitive dictionary)
The header filter configuration
member.returns: True if the header matches the filter

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MailboxRouter.MatchesSourceFilter(System.String,System.String,Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.SourceFilterOptions)
member.summary: Checks if a message source (client hostname or IP address) matches a source filter.
member.param: Client hostname from EHLO/HELO command
Client IP address
The source filter configuration
member.returns: True if the source matches the filter

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MailboxRouter.MatchesRegexPattern(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Matches a value against a regex pattern with timeout protection.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MailboxRouter.MatchesGlobPattern(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Matches a value against a glob pattern.

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MimeMetadata
member.summary: Represents MIME metadata extracted from a message for storage in the database

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MimeMetadata.CcRecipients
member.summary: CC recipients extracted from MIME headers

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MimeMetadata.AttachmentFilenames
member.summary: Attachment filenames from Content-Disposition and Content-Type headers

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MimeMetadata.HasHtmlBody
member.summary: Whether the message has HTML body content

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MimeMetadata.HasTextBody
member.summary: Whether the message has plain text body content

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MimeMetadata.ContentType
member.summary: Content-Type of the main message

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.MimeMetadata.PartCount
member.summary: Total number of MIME parts in the message

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Pop3.ICommandHandler.ExecuteAsync(Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Pop3.Pop3SessionContext,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a single POP3 command.
member.param: The session context.
The argument string (may be null or empty).
Cancellation token.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Pop3.Pop3Server.TryCreateListenersWithFallback(System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Net.Sockets.TcpListener}},System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Net.Sockets.TcpListener}})
member.summary: Tries to create listeners with IPv6, falls back to IPv4 if IPv6 is not supported

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Pop3.Pop3Server.CreateTcpListenerWithDualMode(System.Net.IPAddress,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a TcpListener with DualMode enabled for IPv6

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.ClientOptions.PageSize
member.summary: Page size for message pagination

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.ClientOptions.AutoViewNewMessages
member.summary: Whether to automatically view new messages as they arrive

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.ClientOptions.DarkMode
member.summary: Dark mode setting: "follow" (default), "dark", or "light"

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.HeaderFilterOptions.Header
member.summary: The header name to match (e.g., "X-Application", "X-Mailer")

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.HeaderFilterOptions.Pattern
member.summary: The pattern to match against the header value. - For exact match: "value" - For regex: "/pattern/" (case-insensitive) - For existence check: ".*" (header exists with any value)

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.SourceFilterOptions.Pattern
member.summary: The pattern to match against the client hostname (from EHLO/HELO) or IP address. - For exact match: "hostname.example.com" or "192.168.1.1" - For wildcard: "*.example.com" or "192.168.*" - For regex: "/pattern/" (case-insensitive)

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.MailboxOptions.HeaderFilters
member.summary: Optional header-based filters for routing messages to this mailbox. If specified, all filters must match for the message to be routed to this mailbox. Header filters are checked before recipient patterns.

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.MailboxOptions.SourceFilters
member.summary: Optional source-based filters for routing messages to this mailbox. If specified, all filters must match for the message to be routed to this mailbox. Source filters are checked before header filters and recipient patterns. Matches against the client hostname (from EHLO/HELO) or IP address.

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.MailboxOptions.AuthenticatedUsers
member.summary: Optional filter to route messages from specific authenticated users to this mailbox. Accepts a single username or an array of usernames. If specified, messages from these authenticated users will be routed to this mailbox (matched against the user's DefaultMailbox setting). This filter is checked before source, header, and recipient filters.

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.ServerOptions.DeliverMessagesToUsersDefaultMailbox
member.summary: DEPRECATED: Use mailbox configuration with AuthenticatedUsers property instead for better flexibility. When true, authenticated SMTP sessions will deliver messages to the user's DefaultMailbox, bypassing all mailbox routing rules including header filters. For more flexible routing that allows header-based filtering even for authenticated users, configure mailboxes with the AuthenticatedUsers property and position them in the desired order.

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.ServerOptions.OAuth2Authority
member.summary: OAuth2/XOAUTH2 Identity Provider (IDP) Authority URL for token validation. Example: https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/v2.0 for Azure AD When SmtpAllowAnyCredentials is false, tokens will be validated against this IDP.

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.ServerOptions.OAuth2Audience
member.summary: OAuth2/XOAUTH2 Audience value for token validation. The token must be issued for this audience to be accepted.

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Server.Settings.ServerOptions.OAuth2Issuer
member.summary: OAuth2/XOAUTH2 Issuer value for token validation. The token must be issued by this issuer to be accepted. If not specified, issuer validation is performed using the authority's discovery document.

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.ColoredConsoleFormatter
member.summary: A Serilog formatter that outputs log messages with colors and conditional emoji support. Emojis are only shown for Warning, Error, and Fatal levels, and only if emoji support is detected. Colors are disabled when output is redirected (e.g., captured by tests).

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.ColoredConsoleFormatter.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new ColoredConsoleFormatter. Colors are automatically disabled when console output is redirected.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.ColoredConsoleFormatter.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new ColoredConsoleFormatter with explicit emoji control. Colors are automatically disabled when console output is redirected.
member.param: Whether to use emoji prefixes for warnings and errors.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.ColoredConsoleFormatter.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new ColoredConsoleFormatter with explicit emoji and color control.
member.param: Whether to use emoji prefixes for warnings and errors.
Whether to use ANSI color codes.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.ColoredConsoleFormatter.Format(Serilog.Events.LogEvent,System.IO.TextWriter)
member.summary: Format the log event to the output.

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.ConsoleHelper
member.summary: Helper class for console-related functionality including emoji support detection.

member.name: P:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.ConsoleHelper.IsEmojiSupported
member.summary: Gets whether emoji rendering is likely supported by the current console.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.ConsoleHelper.DetectEmojiSupport
member.summary: Detects whether the console is likely to support emoji rendering. This uses heuristics based on environment variables and terminal type.

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.ConsoleHelper.EnsureUtf8Console
member.summary: Sets the console output encoding to UTF-8 if not already set. Call this early in program startup.

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.ConsoleStreamSink
member.summary: A Serilog sink that writes to either Console.Out or Console.Error

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.HostingEnvironmentHelper.IsRunningInProcessIIS
member.summary: Check if this process is running on Windows in an in process instance in IIS
member.returns: True if Windows and in an in process instance on IIS, false otherwise

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.HostingEnvironmentHelper.GetEditableSettingsFilePath
member.summary: Get path to appsettings.json to which settings changed at runtime should be saved. For IIS this is inside the runtime directory.

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.LogEntry
member.summary: Represents a structured log entry

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Service.ServerLogService
member.summary: Service to capture and store server logs in memory for streaming to web UI

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Startup.ValidateDatabaseVersionCompatibility(Rnwood.Smtp4dev.Data.Smtp4devDbContext)
member.summary: Validates that the database version is compatible with the current application version. Throws an exception if the database has migrations that are newer than what this application knows about.
member.param: The database context to check

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.TUI.HtmlRenderer
member.summary: Converts HTML content to readable terminal format

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.TUI.UsersDialog
member.summary: Dialog for managing SMTP users

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.TUI.MailboxesDialog
member.summary: Dialog for managing mailboxes

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.TUI.MessagesTab
member.summary: Messages tab with split view: message list on left, details on right

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.TUI.SessionsTab
member.summary: Sessions tab with split view: session list on left, log details on right

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.TUI.SettingsDialog
member.summary: Settings dialog with form-like layout for editing configuration

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.TUI.SettingsManager
member.summary: Manages reading and writing settings to appsettings.json

member.name: T:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.TUI.TerminalGuiApp
member.summary: Terminal.Gui-based TUI application that mirrors the web UI layout

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.WindowsServiceManager.Install(System.String)
member.summary: Installs smtp4dev as a Windows service. Requires administrator privileges.
member.param: The full path to the executable (without --service flag).

member.name: M:Rnwood.Smtp4dev.WindowsServiceManager.Uninstall
member.summary: Uninstalls the smtp4dev Windows service. Requires administrator privileges.
